title: ROADMAP SESSION: Let's talk about what's next for the marketplace! (q4/24)
excerpt:

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all!
After a long time, I’m excited to announce that we’re hosting a roadmap session for our developer community!
The event will take place online on October 22nd, 2024, at 10 AM EST / 3 PM IDT on Zoom.
Please register here

In addition, I’m currently planning the next steps for the developer community and would love to hear your thoughts and feedback on what’s missing or could be improved.
If you’d like to contribute, please fill out this feedback form.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Omer, is there any chance of a recording? It’s at 3 am in New Zealand.

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Reinier, this kind of sessions are usually not recorded, but I’ll get back to you about it soon on Slack

posts.author: bradfoster (Brad Foster)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 for a recording of the session please!

posts.author: benhowes (Ben Howes 🐨)
posts.cookedHtml: Also +1 for a recording! I was unable to make some previous online and in person events and would have really benefited from a recording
